title: What are your Evangelion 3010 promotion ideas
display_title: What are your Evangelion 3010 promotion ideas
wikitext:
[]: What are your Evangelion 3.0+1.0 promotion ideas?             Quote Post by The Cruel » Mon Nov 02, 2015 7:58 am If a TV spot, a teaser, a Trailer or any other promotion from 3.0+1.0 'll be presented, how 'll it be? My Idea for a promotion 'll be like this: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Nov 02, 2015 12:40 pm Hideaki Anno walks out onto a solid black or white matte, says "Evangelion 3.0+1.0. It's more Evangelion, you're gonna like it." and then walks off. The film's title and release date overlay. There's no sound or music. All the nerds automatically go see the movie. It makes a kajillion dollars.

[]:             Quote Post by unz » Mon Nov 02, 2015 1:29 pm Traceurwolves.Like werewolves doing parkour. Idk how it works, slap the promo on a toothbrush.

[]:             Quote Post by The Cruel » Mon Nov 02, 2015 1:55 pm ^ Sounds funny.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Nov 02, 2015 2:51 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Hideaki Anno walks out onto a solid black or white matte, says "Evangelion 3.0+1.0. It's more Evangelion, you're gonna watch it. Doesn't matter if you like it." and then walks off. The film's title and release date overlay. There's no sound or music. All the nerds automatically go see the movie. It makes a kajillion dollars.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Nov 02, 2015 3:02 pm A full 30 seconds of piano music with the title and release date, and nothing else.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Nov 02, 2015 3:21 pm ^ Been there, done that. This time it will be 30 seconds of Cello music, followed by the title and possibly the release date.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Nov 02, 2015 7:25 pm Bach's second cello suite...

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Nov 02, 2015 8:30 pm ^ Ohhhhh.... I like it .

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Mon Nov 02, 2015 10:33 pm I'd like to see another trailer like this: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0bYPk_kpYkk Save the minimalist trailers until right before the release of the movie and give us some emotion and some meat!

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Nov 03, 2015 12:57 am Fade In. Wide. A sound recording studio in Tokyo. Over the Shoulder On: An empty sound booth. The sound booth door opens. MEGUMI OGATA walks in. She smiles. ANNO (O.S.) Megumi. Welcome. OGATA Thank you. It's great to be back. It's been a while. Ogata takes a sip of water & puts her headphones on. ANNO (O.S.) Are we ready to begin? TECHNICIAN (O.S.) Yep. ANNO (O.S.) Megumi, you got the line? Ogata nods her head. ANNO (O.S.) Okay. You go whenever you're ready. Ogata smiles. She closes her eyes & breathes in. Calming herself. Nothing happens for a solid 10 seconds. Close Up: On Ogata. She SHRIEKS one of those famous patented Shinji screams of absolute horror that we've come to know & love. It goes on seemingly forever. After a good 30 seconds she finishes. Applause around the room. Ogata smiles & bows her head. Cut to black. Title Credit: EVANGELION 3.0 + 1.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Tue Nov 03, 2015 3:33 am Let just rehash fapping scene and "so disgusting" and every true fan will start drooling

[]:             Quote Post by LightDragonman » Tue Nov 03, 2015 10:24 pm I do have a feeling that they'll unveil a trailer in front of Shin Gojira screenings as a way to increase attendance. Hey, it worked for Star Wars and Metal Gear Solid.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Nov 03, 2015 11:20 pm I wouldn't get your hopes up. Predicting when a new Eva trailer will premiere is only an exercise in futility.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Nov 04, 2015 3:53 am [quote=" Gendo'sPapa":1s3biszc][/quote:1s3biszc] Wow, I like this even more, than I should (maybe). Would definitely be pretty awesome!

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Wed Nov 04, 2015 6:47 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: I wouldn't get your hopes up. Predicting when a new Eva trailer will premiere is only an exercise in futility.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Nov 04, 2015 7:41 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: Everything

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Thu Nov 05, 2015 1:17 am I'd just get everyone prepped by releasing a bunch of old material then release a trailer at the beginning of a new year with a release date. Sounds classy as fuck to me.

[]:             Quote Post by KRandMJ » Fri Nov 06, 2015 6:15 pm Ties in nicely to the previous (3+1) trailer [url]https://youtu.be/HkY1_TpucLA[/url] The End Of Evangelion - II Air (Orchestral Suite No. 3) Let the Fans infer meaning/generate hype. <---Anno...probably. (NOT)

[]:             Quote Post by Yaywalter » Fri Nov 13, 2015 12:54 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Hideaki Anno walks out onto a solid black or white matte, says "Evangelion 3.0+1.0. It's more Evangelion, you're gonna like it." and then walks off. The film's title and release date overlay. There's no sound or music. All the nerds automatically go see the movie. It makes a kajillion dollars.
